explanation: A series of suspicious events occurred on host DC1, indicating a potential automated attempt to escalate privileges. Multiple special privilege assignments to the SYSTEM account and repeated Credential Manager credential reads were detected within a short time frame. This activity suggests a possible privilege escalation attack, which could allow an attacker to gain elevated access to sensitive resources. The attack chain indicates an initial access phase followed by privilege escalation, increasing the risk of further malicious activity.
title: Potential Privilege Escalation on DC1
recommended_actions: Investigate and verify the legitimacy of the SYSTEM account activity
Review and monitor Credential Manager credential reads for suspicious patterns
Consider implementing additional security controls to restrict privilege assignments and credential access
evidence: Multiple special privilege assignments to the SYSTEM account (Event ID 4672)
Repeated Credential Manager credential reads (Event ID 5379)
Logon and logoff events from the SYSTEM account (Event IDs 4624 and 4634)
